zh-CN.name: 理发师
zh-CN.intro: 理发师是帮我们剪头发、做漂亮发型的人。小朋友头发长了，理发师会给我们剪得又整齐又好看。

story.title: ✂️小绵羊剪头发
story.body: 小绵羊毛毛的头发长得太长了，都遮住眼睛了。妈妈笑着说：我们去理发店找理发师吧。到了理发店，长颈鹿理发师系着彩色围裙，笑眯眯地欢迎它们。理发师给小绵羊围上柔软的围布，拿起梳子和剪刀，咔嚓咔嚓地剪起来。小绵羊有点紧张，缩了缩脖子。理发师温柔地说：别怕，很快你就有个漂亮的新发型了。剪完头发，理发师又用吹风机轻轻吹了吹，拿出镜子给小绵羊看。哇，头发整齐又精神！小绵羊开心地照来照去，对妈妈说：理发师叔叔真厉害！我们下次还要来。

knowledge.title: 理发师用什么工具？
knowledge.body: 理发师有好几样好帮手：剪刀咔嚓咔嚓剪头发，梳子把头发梳整齐，电推剪嗡嗡响，可以推短头发。还有吹风机，把头发吹干吹蓬松。现在理发店还有烫发棒和染发膏，能做出更多漂亮发型呢。

en.name: Barber
en.intro: A barber is someone who cuts our hair and makes it look nice. When your hair gets too long, a barber can help you get a neat and tidy haircut.

story.title: ✂️The Little Sheep Gets a Haircut
story.body: The little sheep's woolly hair had grown too long, covering its eyes. Mama said with a smile, Let's go see the barber. At the barber shop, the giraffe barber wore a colorful apron and welcomed them warmly. The barber put a soft cape around the little sheep, took a comb and scissors, and began snipping away. The little sheep felt a bit nervous and shrank its neck, but the barber said gently, Don't worry, you'll have a nice new haircut soon. After cutting, the barber used a hairdryer to blow gently, then held up a mirror. Wow, neat and fresh! The little sheep looked in the mirror happily and said to Mama, The barber is amazing! We must come again.

knowledge.title: What tools do barbers use?
knowledge.body: Barbers have several helpful tools: scissors go snip snip to cut the hair, combs make it tidy, and electric clippers buzz to trim hair short. There is also a hairdryer to blow hair dry and fluffy. Nowadays, there are curling irons and hair dye too, for even more beautiful styles.
